results.title: Nets' Demin Excited to Play Alongside 'Aura Bro' Brown
results.description: Brooklyn’s dynamic "Aura Bros" are redefining the backcourt. After Egor Demin’s explosive scoring display, the duo's playmaking promise offers a high-voltage glimpse into the Nets' future success.

results.title: BAZZANA WALKS IT OFF!!!
results.description: THANK YOU TRAVIS BAZZANA FOR SAVING THIS GAME!!! Seriously that was such a tough watch for the first 7 1/2 innings. The pitching staff kept us in the game but the offense was looking grim until that rally in the bottom of the 8th. Then when Bailey got thrown out at home I couldn’t help [...]

results.title: Tampa Bay Rays Drop Third Straight, Lose Series to Red Sox After All-Star Break
results.description: The Tampa Bay Rays have dropped three straight after the All-Star Break, watching their AL East lead shrink following another loss to the Red Sox. Despite home runs from Victor Mesa Jr. and Jonny DeLuca, Tampa Bay now faces growing urgency ahead of the MLB trade deadline.

results.title: Spain and Argentina brace for World Cup final
results.description: Lionel Messi's battle-hardened Argentina take on silky Spain in the World Cup final on Sunday as the first 48-team tournament in history reaches a climax in New Jersey.Argentina coach Lionel Scaloni urged fans to make the most of seeing the diminutive genius lead out his team at the MetLife Stadium at the age of 39.
